special_mechanics.name: No Jump
special_mechanics.description: Player character cannot jump at all; movement is restricted to walking, climbing ladders, and hanging from hand-to-hand bars

special_mechanics.name: Ladder Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player can climb vertical ladders for multi-story traversal

special_mechanics.name: Hand-to-Hand Bars
special_mechanics.description: Suspended horizontal bars that allow traversal and enable special digging mechanics from hanging position

special_mechanics.name: Fall Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Player can fall from arbitrary heights without injury. Falls faster than guards, enabling tactical positioning

special_mechanics.name: Hole Digging
special_mechanics.description: Player can dig holes in adjacent floor tiles to trap guards. Holes fill after short delay. Player cannot climb out of holes and dies if filled before escape

physics_values.dig_directions: adjacent sides only, not directly beneath
physics_values.multi_layer_requirement: gap width must equal number of layers

special_mechanics.name: Guard Collision - Feet-to-Head Contact
special_mechanics.description: Player can safely walk over guards' heads when guards are trapped in holes or falling. Contact from above is safe; downward movement initiating contact is fatal

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/Qualitative data only. No numerical physics parameters documented in available sources. Game mechanics are well-described qualitatively but contain no quantified movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel precision data.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Lode Runner NES page)
